name: NZBC — New Zealand Building Code (MBIE Acceptable Solutions)
regulator: Ministry of Business, Innovation and Employment (MBIE)
description: Enables OCERP built-in validation rules covering the performance-based New Zealand Building Code and the MBIE Acceptable Solutions / Verification Methods that demonstrate compliance. Covers the most commonly invoked clauses for residential and light commercial work: B1 Structure, B2 Durability, C Fire safety, E2 External moisture, F2/F4 Hazardous building materials & fall safety, G12 Water supplies, H1 Energy efficiency.

key_clauses.B1: Structure (Acceptable Solution B1/AS1 — refers to NZS 3604 etc.)
key_clauses.H1: Energy efficiency (H1/AS1 — updated 2022 thermal envelope uplift)
